message:
feat(server): major TUI overhaul with new screens, event system, and markdown rendering

TUI core infrastructure:
- tui_events.rs (+236 lines): new event handling system with typed
  event dispatch, keyboard navigation, and screen transition logic
- tui_markdown.rs (+42 lines): new markdown rendering module for
  displaying rich message content in terminal UI
- tui_app.rs: refactor app state to support new screen architecture
- tui_decision.rs: update decision tree for screen routing
- tui_macro.rs: adjust macro screen to work with new event system
- tui_widgets.rs (+120 lines): new reusable widget components for
  consistent styling across screens
- console.rs (+66 lines): enhanced console output formatting

TUI screens:
- dashboard.rs (+169 lines): expanded dashboard with project overview,
  agent activity summary, and quick navigation
- messages.rs (+423 lines): rich message viewer with thread context,
  inline markdown rendering, and reply composition
- search.rs (+380 lines): full-text search screen with real-time
  results, faceted filtering, and result highlighting
- threads.rs: fix compilation errors and align with new event system
- timeline.rs: update timeline screen for new widget components
- tool_metrics.rs: update metrics display for consistency

Benchmarks and tests:
- frame_bench.rs: update frame rendering benchmarks for new widgets
- widget_bench.rs: add benchmarks for new widget components
- alien_integration.rs: update integration tests for TUI changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     frame: &mut Frame<'_>,
     area: Rect,
